title: .aieng external tool requirements
description: Structured handoff contract describing which external CAD/CAE/runtime capabilities are required, which candidate tools may provide them, and what evidence must be written back after execution. .aieng records this contract; external tools execute.

source_task_id.description: Optional: task_id from task/task_spec.yaml if a task spec is present.

capability.description: Named capability required for this handoff.

tool_role.description: Category of external tool that provides this capability.

required.description: Whether this capability is mandatory for task completion.

reason.description: Human-readable reason this capability is listed.

required_capabilities.description: Capabilities that external tools must provide for this handoff.

status.description: Availability status. 'candidate' means not installed or confirmed available.

notes.description: Optional notes about this candidate tool.

candidate_tools.description: External tools that may satisfy required capabilities. Status 'candidate' means not installed or confirmed available by .aieng.

bounded_steps_only.description: Must be true. External tools must execute bounded, inspectable steps only.

inspect_before_execution.description: Must be true. Agent must inspect package state before instructing external tool execution.

reinspect_after_external_change.description: Must be true. Agent must re-inspect package after any external tool writes back.

record_artifacts.description: Must be true. All artifacts produced by external tools must be recorded.

record_tool_trace.description: Must be true. Tool execution traces must be recorded for auditability.

external_tools_execute.description: Must be true. CAD modification, mesh generation, solver execution, and result generation are performed by external tools only.

aieng_core_executes_external_tools.description: Must be false. .aieng core does not invoke CAD kernels, meshers, solvers, or manufacturing checkers.

handoff_policy.description: Handoff policy constraints. All flags enforce the execution boundary between .aieng and external CAD/CAE tools.

writeback_requirements.description: Evidence items that external tools must write back before the handoff outcome can be accepted.

forbidden_core_actions.description: Actions that .aieng core must never perform. External tools are responsible for these.

$comment: Phase 14B: external tool handoff contract. handoff_policy.external_tools_execute must be true and aieng_core_executes_external_tools must be false. These are hard execution-boundary guards enforced by schema const constraints.
